description_long: This object depicts a modern residential compound featuring multiple single-story houses arranged on either side of a central driveway. The layout includes landscaped green spaces with trees, a swimming pool, and recreational areas such as a playground and patio seating. The houses have flat roofs, large windows, and minimalist facades, with one structure standing out as a two-story building. The compound is bordered by low fences and includes paved walkways and driveways, as well as a prominent entry gate. The materials appear to be a mix of concrete, glass, and wood, with greenery integrated throughout the site. The overall design emphasizes open space, privacy, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern residential compound with multiple flat-roofed houses, landscaped gardens, a pool, and a central driveway, featuring minimalist facades and large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry gate, central driveway, and symmetrical arrangement of houses with visible green spaces and recreational areas.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the two-story building, the pool area, and the depth of the compound with trees and pathways.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyards, pool, and the overall symmetry of the compound, with clear visibility of the flat roofs and garden layout.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view focusing on the playground, patio, and the expanse of the driveway leading to the entry gate.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide gate, paved driveway, and minimalist doorways with no prominent porch or decorative columns.
